text: The person with the most Linear issues in the 'in_progress' state is dave, with exactly 2 issues.

tool_calls.name: execute_js
tool_calls.input: {"code":"const rows = linear.list_issues({ state: 'in_progress' }); const counts = new Map(); for (const row of rows) { const assignee = row.assignee; counts.set(assignee, (counts.get(assignee) || 0) + 1); } const entries = [...counts.entries()]; const maxEntry = entries.reduce((a, b) => a[1] > b[1] ? a : b); const login = maxEntry[0]; const count = maxEntry[1]; { login, count }"}
